name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes late submissions to clients. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and reconciliation.
problem_solved: Manual categorization and reconciliation of travel expenses is time-consuming.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual categorization and reconciliation of travel expenses is time-consuming.
